AdminUser.title: AdminUser
AdminUser.description: Represents an administrative user within the CMS, linked to an external authentication system. Stores roles and profile information, but explicitly excludes authentication credentials like passwords.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AdminUser. This typically corresponds to the user ID from an external authentication system (e.g., Firebase Auth UID).

email.description: The email address of the administrative user.

firstName.description: The first name of the administrative user.

lastName.description: The last name of the administrative user.

role.description: The role assigned to the user, defining their permissions within the CMS (e.g., 'admin', 'editor').

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile image.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the admin user record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the admin user record was last updated.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Stores global configuration, branding controls, SEO defaults, performance optimization, and integration settings for the entire website. Typically, there should be only one record of this entity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the settings record (e.g., 'globalSettings').

websiteName.description: The official name of the website or salon.

logoUrl.description: URL to the primary logo image of the salon, used across the website.

brandPrimaryColor.description: Hexadecimal code for the primary brand color, used for overall theme.

brandAccentColor.description: Hexadecimal code for the accent brand color, used for highlights and interactive elements.

fontHeadline.description: CSS font-family string for headline typography (e.g., 'Playfair', serif).

fontBody.description: CSS font-family string for body text typography (e.g., 'PT Sans', sans-serif).

defaultHeroImageUrl.description: Default URL for the hero image displayed on pages without a specific hero image.

defaultBackgroundImageUrl.description: Default URL for general background images used throughout the site.

instagramProfileUrl.description: URL to the salon's Instagram profile for embedding feeds or direct links.

seoTitlePrefix.description: A prefix applied to all page SEO titles if not overridden by page-specific settings (e.g., 'Verde Salon | ').

seoMetaDescriptionDefault.description: Default meta description for pages without a specific one, used for search engine snippets.

googleTagManagerId.description: The ID for Google Tag Manager integration.

googleAnalyticsId.description: The ID for Google Analytics integration.

googleSearchConsoleVerificationCode.description: Verification code for Google Search Console (e.g., HTML tag content).

facebookPixelId.description: The ID for Facebook Pixel tracking.

hubspotIntegrationEnabled.description: Flag to enable or disable HubSpot CRM integration.

gohighlevelIntegrationEnabled.description: Flag to enable or disable GoHighLevel CRM integration.

zapierWebhookUrl.description: URL for a Zapier webhook to send form submissions or other events.

stripePublicKey.description: Public key for Stripe payment gateway integration.

paypalClientId.description: Client ID for PayPal payment gateway integration.

razorpayKeyId.description: Key ID for Razorpay payment gateway integration.

imageOptimizationEnabled.description: Toggle for one-click image optimization (compression, WebP conversion).

webpConversionEnabled.description: Toggle for automatic conversion of uploaded images to WebP format.

minifyCssEnabled.description: Toggle for one-click CSS minification to improve page speed.

minifyJsEnabled.description: Toggle for one-click JavaScript minification to improve page speed.

lazyLoadImagesEnabled.description: Toggle for lazy loading images to defer loading of off-screen images.

cacheDurationInMinutes.description: Duration in minutes for client-side caching settings.

autoSitemapGenerationEnabled.description: Toggle for automatic sitemap.xml generation for SEO.

robotsTxtContent.description: Custom content for the robots.txt file, allowing fine-grained control over search engine crawling.

structuredSchemaDefault.description: Default JSON-LD structured data schema (as a JSON string) for the entire site or as a fallback.

whatsappIntegrationPhoneNumber.description: Phone number for WhatsApp integration, if enabled, for direct communication.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the settings were last updated.

Page.title: Page
Page.description: Represents a single webpage on the Verde Salon website, including its content layout, metadata, and SEO configurations.

title.description: The human-readable title of the page displayed in the navigation and browser tab.

slug.description: URL-friendly slug for the page (e.g., 'about-us' for an About Us page), forming part of its URL.

description.description: An internal description of the page for CMS users, not typically displayed publicly.

isPublished.description: Indicates whether the page is live and accessible to the public.

seoTitle.description: Specific SEO title for the page, overriding global settings if provided, displayed in search results.

metaDescription.description: Specific meta description for the page, overriding global settings if provided, used in search engine snippets.

canonicalUrl.description: The canonical URL for this page, used for SEO to prevent duplicate content issues.

openGraphTitle.description: Open Graph title for social media sharing, displayed when the page is shared.

openGraphDescription.description: Open Graph description for social media sharing.

openGraphImageUrl.description: URL to an image for social media sharing (Open Graph image).

layoutTemplate.description: Identifier for the layout template used by this page (e.g., 'homepage', 'services-listing', 'blog-listing', 'standard-content').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the page was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the page content or metadata was last updated.

publishedAt.description: Timestamp when the page was last published or made live.

PageSection.title: PageSection
PageSection.description: Represents a distinct, editable content block or module within a Page, allowing for flexible page construction via a page builder.

id.description: Unique identifier for the page section.

pageId.description: Reference to the Page this section belongs to. (Relationship: Page 1:N PageSection)

order.description: The display order of this section within its parent page, influencing its vertical position on the page.

type.description: The type or component name of the section (e.g., 'hero', 'text-image', 'gallery', 'testimonials-carousel', 'faq-accordion', 'cta-banner', 'instagram-feed', 'service-grid', 'blog-post-list').

content.description: A JSON string containing the specific data and configuration for this section type. This allows for flexible content structures per section type (e.g., {'heading': 'Welcome', 'imageUrl': '...', 'text': '...'}).

isHidden.description: Indicates whether the section is hidden from the public-facing website.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the page section was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the page section content or configuration was last updated.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Details about a specific salon service offered, including pricing, description, and associated media, displayed on the Services page.

name.description: The name of the service (e.g., 'Women's Haircut', 'Full Balayage').

slug.description: URL-friendly slug for the service detail page.

description.description: A detailed description of what the service entails.

shortDescription.description: A brief summary of the service, suitable for previews.

price.description: The price or price range for the service (e.g., '$60', 'Starting from $120').

imageUrl.description: URL to an image representing the service.

categoryId.description: Reference to the ServiceCategory this service belongs to. (Relationship: ServiceCategory 1:N Service)

isPublished.description: Indicates whether the service is actively offered and displayed on the website.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the service record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the service record was last updated.

ServiceCategory.title: ServiceCategory
ServiceCategory.description: Groups related services together, aiding navigation and organization on the Services Page.

id.description: Unique identifier for the service category.

name.description: The name of the service category (e.g., 'Haircuts', 'Coloring', 'Styling').

slug.description: URL-friendly slug for the service category.

description.description: A brief description of the service category.

order.description: The display order of this category on the Services Page, influencing its position in lists.

isPublished.description: Indicates whether the service category is visible on the website.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the service category was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the service category was last updated.

definition.description: Draft version of page sections used by the Visual Architect.
Live/Published version of page sections displayed to public visitors.

firestore.reasoning: Decoupled Draft and Live content into separate collections to avoid Firestore's 1MB document limit when storing large media-heavy sections twice in one document.
